hero.title: How We Turn Ideas Into Empires
hero.description: A proven 5-phase methodology that takes you from concept to revenue-generating system — with full visibility at every step.

discovery.title: Discovery & Strategy
discovery.description: We start by understanding your business inside and out. This phase establishes the foundation for everything we build.

architecture.title: Architecture & Design
architecture.description: With strategy locked, we design the systems and interfaces that will power your growth.

build.title: Build & Automate
build.description: This is where the magic happens. We build fast, test rigorously, and keep you in the loop at every step.

launch.title: Launch & Optimize
launch.description: Deployment is just the beginning. We launch with precision and immediately start optimizing for performance.

scale.title: Scale & Support
scale.description: We do not disappear after launch. We stay on as your growth partner, continuously improving the systems we built.

timeline.title: What to Expect
timeline.description: Key milestones from kickoff to ongoing growth.

week1.milestone: Kickoff call and business audit complete

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: What you can always count on when working with us.

weeklyUpdates.title: Weekly Updates
weeklyUpdates.description: Every week, you get a clear status report — what was done, what is next, and any decisions that need your input. No surprises.

fullTransparency.title: Full Transparency
fullTransparency.description: Shared project boards, live dashboards, and direct access to the team building your product. You see everything we see.

dedicatedPM.title: Dedicated PM
dedicatedPM.description: One point of contact who owns your project end-to-end. They know your business, your goals, and your timeline inside out.

cta.headline: Start Your Journey
cta.subheadline: Book a free strategy call and let's map out your roadmap together.
